tagline: Trusted Pool Care in West Phoenix

hero.headline: Family-Owned Pool Care Since 2004
hero.subheadline: Brian and Susan Wright have kept West Phoenix pools sparkling for over 22 years. From weekly maintenance to full remodels, your pool is in the hands of a family that treats it like their own.
checkmarks: 22+ years specializing in Arizona desert pools
Fair, transparent pricing with no hidden fees

services.headline: Complete Pool Solutions for the Desert Climate
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to major remodels, we handle everything your Arizona pool needs to stay beautiful and functional.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Consistent, reliable maintenance that keeps your water crystal-clear, chemically balanced, and swim-ready even in peak Arizona heat.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, timers, and automation systems to prevent costly breakdowns.

cards.title: Pool Remodels
cards.description: Transform your outdated pool into a modern backyard retreat with updated tile, plaster, coping, and features.

cards.title: Tile & Calcium Cleaning
cards.description: Professional removal of stubborn calcium and mineral deposits caused by Arizona's notoriously hard water.

cards.title: Heater Installation
cards.description: Extend your swim season year-round with expert installation and maintenance of efficient pool heating systems.

cards.title: Automation Systems
cards.description: Smart controls accessible from your smartphone, putting complete pool management at your fingertips from anywhere.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call or fill out our form and we'll set up a no-obligation visit to assess your pool's condition and needs.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Care Plan
steps.description: Brian personally evaluates your pool and recommends the right services, equipment, and schedule for your situation.

steps.title: Enjoy a Worry-Free Pool
steps.description: Sit back while our experienced team handles everything, keeping your pool pristine and equipment running smoothly.

about.label: About Arizona Mirage
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Hard Work and Integrity
about.description: Brian and Susan Wright moved from Illinois to Arizona in 1997 and built Arizona Mirage from the ground up in 2004. Brian's background in commercial diving, welding inspection, and outdoor systems gives him unique expertise in pool care. Susan keeps operations running smoothly behind the scenes. Together, they've built a reputation for honest, dependable service throughout the West Phoenix valley.

features.title: Owner-Operated
features.description: Brian and Susan are personally involved in every job — no subcontractors, no runaround.

features.title: Desert Climate Experts
features.description: Over 22 years mastering the unique challenges Arizona pools face — hard water, heat, and dust.

features.title: Fair, Honest Pricing
features.description: No surprise charges or unnecessary upsells. We quote upfront and stick to it, every time.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: We believe in fair, transparent pricing. Every quote is upfront so you know exactly what to expect before any work begins.

guarantee.headline: Our Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every service we provide. If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. That's the promise Brian and Susan have made to every customer since 2004.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced in Arizona's climate?
faqs.answer: We recommend weekly service for Arizona pools. The intense heat, dust storms, and hard water create conditions that demand consistent attention to prevent algae, calcium buildup, and equipment strain.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Surprise, West Phoenix, Glendale, Peoria, Goodyear, Buckeye, Avondale, Litchfield Park, Sun City, Waddell, Wickenburg, Wittman, Youngtown, and El Mirage.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold Arizona ROC license #323327 and carry full liability insurance. We've been a licensed contractor since 2004.

faqs.question: How do I know if my pool equipment needs repair or replacement?
faqs.answer: Signs include unusual noises, reduced water flow, inconsistent heating, or rising energy bills. Brian will inspect your equipment and give you an honest assessment of whether repair or replacement is more cost-effective.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool remodeling services?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We handle everything from replastering and tile replacement to complete pool transformations including new coping, decking, and water features.

testimonials.name: Long-time Customer
testimonials.text: Arizona Mirage keeps our pool absolutely sparkling. They pick up immediately if there is any problem with the equipment and are always letting us know what needs to be done. Very knowledgeable service at a reasonable price.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: Brian went the extra mile and had a warranty issue resolved on a very timely basis with Hayward corp. The service change of a new pool filter done by Bryce was completed quickly and responsibly.

testimonials.name: Neighborhood Favorite
testimonials.text: Arizona Mirage is our Neighborhood Favorite for pool service in the Twelve Oaks Estates community. They consistently deliver reliable, professional care.

contact.headline: Let's Talk About Your Pool
contact.subtitle: Whether you need weekly service, a repair, or a complete remodel, the Wright family is here to help.
benefits: Direct access to the owner, not a call center

footer.description: Arizona Mirage Pool Services is a family-owned company serving the West Phoenix valley since 2004. Licensed, insured, and committed to honest pool care.
footer.service_area: Serving Surprise, West Phoenix, Glendale, Peoria, Goodyear, Buckeye, Avondale, Litchfield Park, Sun City, and surrounding communities.
